rulings.Case Title: TAKARA BELMONT USA INC A NEW YORK CORPORATION VS. GINA KHAN SALON INC A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Demurrer To Cross-Complaint Of Gina Khan Salon, Inc.; Demurrer; Memorandum Of P/A
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, May 1, 2009, line 15, PLAINTIFF TAKARA BELMONT USA INC.'S Demurrer To Cross-Complaint Of Gina Khan Salon, Inc. Demurrer is sustained with ten days leave to amend. Misrepresentation regarding licensing not incorporated into the negligent misrepresentation cause of action. Misrepresentation cause of action must be supported by representations of fact, not expressions of opinion. See Neu-Visions Sports, Inc., vs. Soren/McAdam/Bartells 86 Cal.App. 4th 303. =(302/CWW/VC)
